name: Shopify sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Shopify sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, refund discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Difficulty in reconciling customer refunds with payment processor data
